input.headline: All you need to know: Ireland's World Cup play-off draw

raw.headline: All you need to know: Ireland's World Cup play-off draw

winner: Why was Ireland's World Cup team feeling a bit peckish after their play-off draw? Because they drew potatoes for an appetizer!

candidates.text: Why did Ireland refuse to dance at the World Cup? Because they didn't want to play a reel they hadn't drawn!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is cleverly worded with a play on 'reel' and 'draw,' tying into the headline's context. It’s concise and surprising, though the humor is somewhat mild and may not resonate as strongly with all audiences."}

candidates.text: Why was Ireland's World Cup team feeling a bit peckish after their play-off draw? Because they drew potatoes for an appetizer!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the 'potatoes' twist, but the connection to Ireland's World Cup play-off draw feels a bit forced and lacks specificity. The humor is mild and not particularly surprising."}

candidates.text: Why was Ireland feeling a bit tense and nervous today? Because they were drawn into overtime for the World Cup play-offs!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks originality and surprise; 'overtime' is a generic term that doesn't specifically tie into World Cup play-offs in a humorous way."}

candidates.text: Why did Ireland suddenly become a soccer ball factory? Because of their repeated play-off draws!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the soccer ball factory pun, but the connection to Ireland's play-off draws is weak and not very specific. It lacks a strong punchline and feels a bit forced."}

candidates.text: Apparently, Ireland drew a match against a mysterious opponent known only as 'the unknown quantity.' I wonder if they'll have any team spirit.
